data.content:
This tombstone doesn't contain any .NET runtime frames. The backtrace shows:

- **Frame #00–#01**: Android system libraries (`libc.so`, `libutils.so`)
- **Frame #02**: A native JNI library (`libnativeapp.so`) — this is a plain native C/C++ library, not .NET
- **Frame #03–#05**: Android ART runtime (`libart.so`)

The app (`com.example.nativeapp`) is a standard Android/Java app with a native JNI component — there are no .NET/Mono/CoreCLR libraries (e.g., `libmonosgen-2.0.so`, `libcoreclr.so`, `libmonodroid.so`) present in any frame.

**There are no .NET runtime frames to symbolicate in this file.**
